_note: Sarmaaya Company Snapshot reference data. Bulk-imported from sarmaya/stocks/{TICKER}.json via scripts/import-sarmaaya-snapshots.ts; earlier entries were pasted by hand. Used to validate our ratio engine. basis='consolidated' marks names where Sarmaaya reports the group (we compute unconsolidated to match PSX), so an EPS/PE gap there is expected, not a bug. 'note' records a conclusion we reached, not scraped data.

CCM.note: micro-cap; earnings cross zero, P/E unreliable on any basis

MCB.note: unverified: our EPS/PE/DY all diverge together, needs filing check

ENGROH.name: Engro Holdings Limited
ENGROH.note: BROKEN on our side: unconsolidated standalone parent earns near-zero profit; TTM math on a near-zero denominator produces P/E ~9731. Needs consolidated read or basis-architecture fix.

FATIMA.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-19: not a bug. Filing gives standalone Q1-2026 EPS 1.99 (our 1.99) and consolidated 1.54; Sarmaaya reports the group. Our unconsolidated TTM 12.66 is correct and P/B agrees at 2.07 vs 2.01.

FCCL.name: Fauji Cement Company Limited
FCCL.note: Sarmaaya quotes the run-rate EPS; our trailing-12m 4.65 is the correct trailing figure

FECTC.note: Sarmaaya carries the restated FY2025 annual; we still hold the original, leaving a ~5% TTM gap

THCCL.note: group figure; our unconsolidated TTM is 6.54. Company also did a 5:1 split to Rs 2 par during FY2026
